chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Date N0.0-1583 0{ 2023 Order with signature of Judge For hearing of maln case 28.11.2023 Petitioner is present in person Mr Ali Raza Balouch, AAG ٦ ٠٠٣٠ + ++٠+٠٢و٦ Petitioner is professor of Physics in Shah Abdul Latif University Khairpur, has this petition directicns ١٨٤ Administration of the University to conduct Senate Election for two vacancies of Syndicate members Mr Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate has filed power on behalf of Respondents No 4 & 5, which is taken on record and undertakes that within two months the Senate Election would be neld to elect two Syndicate members view of undertakinB given by learned Counsel for th٤ University, petitioner satisfies and this petition is accordingly disposed of in the above terms ٤٥ ٨ sg٤ki٨8
